content: We can frame Self-Refine’s single-model iterative self-iteration without external supervision can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that outperforms both original single-perspective Self-Refine and standalone multi-perspective reflection. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no extra training data or reinforcement learning, while fixing its limitation of narrow self-feedback that single-perspective self-criticism easily falls into local optimization.
